params.TriggerDescription: Whenever NICKNAME attacks, draw a card.

params.Description: As long as you control two other Merfolk, CARDNAME has indestructible. (Damage and effects that say "destroy" don't destroy it.)
Other Merfolk you control have ward {1}. (Whenever another Merfolk you control becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {1}.)
